content.problemStatement:
Given two integer arrays nums1 and nums2 and an integer k, return the maximum k valid sum combinations from all possible sum combinations using the elements of nums1 and nums2.



A valid sum combination is made by adding one element from nums1 and one element from nums2. Return the answer in non-increasing order.
content.inputFormat: Two integer arrays nums1 and nums2, and an integer k
content.outputFormat: A list of k integers representing the maximum k valid sum combinations in non-increasing order

solution.approach: Generate all possible sum combinations, sort them in descending order, and return the first k elements
solution.timeComplexity: O(n*m*log(n*m)) where n and m are the lengths of nums1 and nums2 respectively
